NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE STORM SURVEY TEAM CONFIRMED AN EF1 TORNADO IN TOWN OF GHENT. ALTHOUGH PATH LENGTH IS TWO MILES...DAMAGE WAS INTERMITTENT A LONG THE LINE. MOST CONCENTRATED DAMAGE WAS OBSERVED AT INTERSECTION OF SOLLER HEIGHTS ROAD AND COUNTY ROAD 9. DAMAGE WAS MAINLY CONFINED TO DOWNED TREES...ALTHOUGH SOME DAMAGE TO SHINGLES AND SIDING WERE NOTED.
